_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: Expression of DCAF1 led to a large increase in poly-ubiquitylation of Lats1 in Meso-33 cells, and simultaneous expression of Merlin reversed this effect
details: Expression led to large increase in poly-ubiquitylation of Lats1 in Meso-33 cells, which was reversed by simultaneous expression of Merlin
